findings.description: HIVEMIND-ATOMIC-COMMIT is written in uppercase with hyphens in YAML frontmatter skill section (line 29), inconsistent with all other agents using lowercase format. May not parse correctly

findings.description: Role Priming says 'You are NOT a builder' and 'hivemaker implements it' - correct for architect role. However 'hiveq verifies the implementation matches the design' - hiveq doesn't verify designs, it verifies implementations. architect validates design feasibility, not implementation
findings.recommendation: Clarify in role description: architect designs, hivemaker implements, hiveq verifies implementation matches design, code-skeptic challenges assumptions

permission_gaps: write: true but description says 'Never mutates files' - PERMISSION CONFLICT

general.md has CRITICAL permission schema contradiction: has 'write: true' and 'todowrite: allow' but description says 'Never mutates files'
architect.md references 4 non-existent skills - highest count of missing references
hiveq.md references 3 non-existent skills including 'agent-role-boundary' and 'context-entry-verify'
explore.md and general.md appear to be duplicates with conflicting permission schemas
blocked_routes: All agents with non-existent skill references may fail to load correct context
general.md's contradictory permissions would cause undefined behavior if agent is dispatched
carry_forward.recommended_next_action: Wave 1d: Create mapping of valid skill names and propagate correct skill references across all agent files. Priority fixes: (1) Replace ALL 'use-hivemind-context' with 'use-hivemind-context-integrity', (2) Remove or replace 'tdd-delegation', 'research-delegation', 'hivemind-research-tools', 'context-entry-verify', 'agent-role-boundary', 'course-correction-delegation', 'systematic-debugging', 'verification-before-completion', 'context-intelligence-entry', 'use-hivemind-hierarchy', (3) Fix general.md's permission contradiction or remove as duplicate of explore.md
